children.text: No custom React code. No animation libraries to wire up. Just JSON configs that the engine interprets into 60fps animations — parallax, scroll-driven, hover, tilt, morph, gradient, split text, flip, particles, and more.
Built entirely with JSON configuration. Zero custom React components.
